villager.summary: An intelligent mob that can be traded with for valuable items. Has distinct professions.

sheep.summary: A passive mob that can be sheared for wool, a key ingredient for beds.

sniffer.summary: An ancient creature that sniffs out rare decorative seeds (torchflower, pitcher).

enderman.summary: Becomes hostile if looked at directly. Teleports and drops Ender Pearls, which are vital for reaching The End.

iron_golem.summary: A massive defender of villages. Will attack if you harm villagers. Drops iron ingots.

creeper.summary: A silent, explosive mob that is a primary threat to players and their structures. Drops gunpowder.

breeze.summary: A mischievous mob from Trial Chambers that shoots wind charges, causing knockback and activating mechanisms.
breeze.special_notes: Its projectiles can be used to activate redstone components.

warden.summary: A blind and incredibly powerful mob found in the Deep Dark. Hunts using sound and vibrations. Extremely dangerous.
